_design_notes.backgroundTheme: UNKNOWN detected — defaulted to LIGHT. Earthmoving/construction businesses can go either way, but the single bright brand colour (#4134f7 — a vivid electric blue) reads well on a light background with dark text. Set bgColor #ffffff, textColor #111111.
_design_notes.colours: Primary #4134f7 from Firecrawl brand data (strong electric/royal blue). PrimaryDark #2e24d4 (~20% darker). Only one brand colour detected, so derived a complementary accent: gold/amber #f5a623 — high contrast on white, strong visual contrast against blue, suits an earthmoving/industrial business. AccentDark #c4821a.
_design_notes.layout: Ordered: hero → stats → services → about → whyUs → process → testimonials → gallery → contact. Stats immediately after hero — '30 years in the industry' is MBE's strongest trust signal and should land early. Services next as that's what visitors need. About follows to put the family-business story behind the services list. WhyUs before process reinforces why to hire them. Process then explains how it works. Testimonials and gallery disabled (no real content). Contact last.
_design_notes.deviations: Disabled team (no named team members — only Rod and Kevin with phone numbers, not full bios), careers (no hiring mention), projects (no real project case studies), testimonials (no real quotes), and gallery (no customer photos). Stats section enabled using the real '30+ years' figure as the anchor. Kept stats count to three real/supportable values rather than inventing figures.

meta.siteTitle: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving | Cessnock & Hunter Valley
meta.description: Family-owned earthmoving contractors servicing Cessnock, Maitland and the Upper Hunter for over 30 years. Wet hire, excavation, land clearing, roads and dams.

business.name: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving
business.tagline: 30 Years of Getting the Job Done.
business.description: Family-owned earthmoving contractors based in Cessnock, servicing the Hunter Valley and Upper Hunter regions across agricultural, commercial, industrial, mining and residential sectors.

hero.headline: Hunter Valley's Earthmoving Experts
hero.subheadline: Family-owned and operating for over 30 years across Cessnock, Maitland and the Upper Hunter. Wet hire, excavation, land clearing, roads and dams — we have the machine and the experience for every job.

services.headline: What We Do
services.subheadline: A full range of earthmoving services delivered by experienced operators with the right machine for every job.

items.title: Earthmoving & Excavation
items.description: From small residential digs to major commercial and industrial cut-and-fill, our fleet of excavators — 4.5T, 13T and 20T — ensures we have the right machine on your site.

page.heroSub: The right machine, the right operator — every time.
page.intro: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving operates a modern fleet of excavators ranging from 4.5 tonnes to 20 tonnes, backed by over 30 years of experience across the Hunter Valley. Whether you need a precise residential dig or a large-scale commercial excavation, we bring the equipment and expertise to get it done right.

steps.title: Call or Email Us
steps.description: Tell us your project location, scope and timeframe. We'll advise the right machine.

steps.title: Quote & Schedule
steps.description: Receive a clear quote — contract or hourly — and lock in your start date.

steps.title: We Mobilise
steps.description: Our operator and machine arrive on site, ready to work.

steps.title: Job Done
steps.description: Work completed efficiently with minimum disruption to your site.

items.question: What size excavator do I need?
items.answer: It depends on your site access and scope. Call us — we'll advise the right machine for the job at no charge.

items.question: Do you offer wet hire?
items.answer: Yes — all our equipment is available on a wet hire basis, meaning our experienced operator comes with the machine.

items.question: Do you work weekends?
items.answer: Our fleet is available Monday to Friday year-round. Contact us to discuss your specific requirements.

items.question: What areas do you service?
items.answer: Cessnock, Maitland, and the Upper Hunter region. Contact us for projects further afield.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Digging?
cta.subheadline: Contact us for a free quote on your excavation project.

items.title: Roads & Dams Construction
items.description: Purpose-built road construction and dam earthworks for agricultural, pastoral and commercial properties across the Hunter Valley and Upper Hunter.

page.heroSub: Built to last through every season — from access tracks to full irrigation dams.
page.intro: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has been constructing farm roads, access tracks and earth dams across the Hunter and Upper Hunter for over 30 years. We use our grader, dozer, and compaction equipment to deliver roads and dams that perform season after season.

highlights.text: 12H grader and Dozer D6 on fleet

process.headline: How We Build Your Road or Dam

steps.title: Site Assessment
steps.description: We assess the terrain, drainage requirements, and your intended use.

steps.title: Quote
steps.description: Clear pricing on scope — contract or hourly, depending on the job.

steps.title: Earthworks
steps.description: Grading, dozing, compaction and shaping carried out by our experienced team.

steps.title: Final Inspection
steps.description: We check the finished work meets your expectations before we leave site.

items.question: Can you build irrigation dams?
items.answer: Yes — we construct earth fill dams for irrigation, stock water, and fire-fighting purposes.

items.question: What type of roads do you build?
items.answer: Farm tracks, rural access roads, internal estate roads — both new construction and re-grading of existing roads.

items.question: Do I need council approval for a dam?
items.answer: Depending on capacity, some dams require approvals. We can advise based on your location and proposed size.

items.question: How long does a farm road take?
items.answer: Depends on length and terrain. Most farm roads are completed within 1–3 days.

cta.headline: Need a Road or Dam Built?
cta.subheadline: Get in touch for a free quote.

items.title: Land Clearing
items.description: Efficient, controlled land clearing for residential subdivisions, agricultural land and construction sites — using our dozer, stick rake, and wheeled machinery.

page.heroSub: Clear your block quickly and safely — ready for whatever comes next.
page.intro: From small residential blocks to large-scale agricultural clearing, Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has the machinery and experience to clear your land efficiently. We use our Dozer D6, stick rake, and wheeled loader to handle timber, scrub, stumps and debris.

highlights.text: Dozer D6 and stick rake available

steps.title: Quote the Site
steps.description: We assess size, vegetation type, and access to give you an accurate quote.

steps.title: Mobilise Equipment
steps.description: Right machinery on site — dozer, stick rake, and support equipment as needed.

steps.title: Clear and Remove
steps.description: Systematic clearing, with debris pushed, piled or removed per your requirements.

steps.title: Ready for Next Stage
steps.description: Site left clean and prepared for construction, farming or further earthworks.

items.question: Do I need approval to clear my land?
items.answer: Clearing regulations vary. We recommend checking with your local council before work begins — we can advise based on the region.

items.question: Can you remove the debris after clearing?
items.answer: Yes — we can push and pile, burn (where permitted), or arrange removal depending on your preference.

items.question: How quickly can you start?
items.answer: Subject to current workload and scheduling. Contact us to discuss your timeframe.

items.question: Can you clear steep terrain?
items.answer: Yes — our dozer and tracked equipment are suited to difficult terrain across the Upper Hunter region.

cta.headline: Ready to Clear Your Site?
cta.subheadline: Get in touch for a free quote on land clearing.

items.title: Site Filling & Rehabilitation
items.description: Site filling, levelling and rehabilitation for post-construction, mining and agricultural sites — leaving your land in the best possible condition.

page.heroSub: Restore and prepare your site with expert earthworks from start to finish.
page.intro: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has extensive experience in site filling, levelling, compaction and full site rehabilitation. Whether you're finishing a construction project, closing out a mine site, or restoring agricultural land, we have the fleet and expertise to do it right.

highlights.text: Semi tipper and tipper truck available

steps.title: Site Review
steps.description: We assess current conditions, volumes, and your end-use requirements.

steps.title: Scope & Quote
steps.description: Clear breakdown of works, machinery required, and pricing.

steps.title: Earthworks
steps.description: Fill placement, grading, compaction, and shaping to specification.

steps.title: Final Finish
steps.description: Site left level, compacted, and ready for handover or ongoing use.

items.question: Can you source fill material?
items.answer: We can advise on fill sourcing. Contact us to discuss your project requirements.

items.question: Do you handle erosion control?
items.answer: Yes — we install silt fencing and can advise on erosion control measures as part of your project.

items.question: Do you work on mining rehabilitation projects?
items.answer: Yes — we have experience servicing the mining industry across the Hunter and Upper Hunter regions.

items.question: What compaction equipment do you have?
items.answer: We operate a smooth drum roller and can provide compaction to specification.

cta.headline: Need Site Filling or Rehabilitation?
cta.subheadline: Talk to our team about your project today.

items.title: Wet Hire — Full Fleet
items.description: Hire any machine from our extensive fleet — complete with an experienced operator. Available Monday to Friday, year-round, on contract or hourly rates.
features: Tipper trucks, water cart, low loader

page.heroSub: The right machine, with an experienced operator — available Monday to Friday, year-round.
page.intro: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving offers wet hire across our entire machinery fleet. Every machine comes with one of our experienced operators — so you get the equipment and the expertise on-site from day one. Available on contract or hourly rates, Monday to Friday all year round.

highlights.text: Semi tipper, tipper & dog, low loader
Wheel loader, wheeled skid steer bobcat
Rock grab, auger, broom, stick rake attachments

items.question: What is wet hire?
items.answer: Wet hire means you hire the machine and the operator together — we supply both.

items.question: Do you offer dry hire (machine only)?
items.answer: We specialise in wet hire. Contact us to discuss your specific needs.

items.question: What days are machines available?
items.answer: Monday to Friday, all year round.

items.question: Can I hire for a single day?

about.headline: About Mitchell Bros Earthmoving
about.body:
Mitchell Bros Earthmoving is a family-owned and operated business that has been serving the Hunter Valley and Upper Hunter regions for over 30 years. Based in Cessnock, we work across the agricultural, commercial, construction, industrial, mining and residential sectors — bringing the right machine and the right expertise to every project.

Our operators and fleet are available Monday to Friday, all year round, on both contract and hourly rates. When you deal with MBE, you're dealing with experienced professionals who take their work seriously. Give Rod or Kevin a call — we're ready to help.

highlights.text: Servicing Cessnock, Maitland and the Upper Hunter

aboutPage.heroSub: Over 30 years of earthmoving experience across the Hunter Valley. Family-owned, locally trusted.

mission.headline: Our Mission
mission.text: To deliver professional, reliable earthmoving services that get the job done right — with the right machine, the right operator, and no unnecessary complications. We've built our reputation on hard work, honest pricing, and showing up when we say we will.

story.headline: Our Story
paragraphs: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has been a fixture in the Cessnock and Hunter Valley region for over 30 years. Starting as a family business, we've grown our fleet and our reputation by doing one thing consistently: delivering quality earthmoving work on time and on budget.

We service the agricultural, commercial, construction, industrial, mining and residential industries — and our broad fleet means we rarely have to turn a job away. From a small residential excavation to a large-scale mining rehabilitation project, we bring the same professionalism to every site.
Based at 141 Mount View Road, Cessnock, we're genuinely local. We know the terrain, the conditions, and the communities we work in. That's something you can't replicate.

items.title: Family Values
items.description: We're a family business and we treat our clients accordingly — with honesty, respect and genuine care for the outcome.

items.title: The Right Machine
items.description: Our extensive fleet means we can match the right equipment to every job — no compromises.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: We turn up, we do the work, and we leave the site better than we found it. It's that simple.

items.title: 30 Years of Experience
items.description: Three decades of earthmoving in the Hunter Valley means we've seen it all — and we know how to handle it.

cta.headline: Ready to Work With Us?
cta.subheadline: Get in touch for a free quote — no obligation.

careers.heroSub: We're always looking for skilled, reliable operators and earthmoving professionals.

projects.headline: Our Projects
projects.subheadline: A selection of earthmoving and civil work across the Hunter Valley.

process.headline: How It Works
process.subheadline: Straightforward from first contact to final machine off site.

steps.title: Call or Email Us
steps.description: Describe your job — location, scope and timeframe. We'll ask the right questions and recommend the best machine for the task.

steps.title: We Quote You
steps.description: Clear pricing — contract or hourly — with no hidden extras. Once you're happy, we lock in a start date.

steps.title: On Site & Working
steps.description: Our operator and machine arrive on time and get straight to work. We keep things moving efficiently and professionally.

steps.title: Job Complete
steps.description: Work finished to your satisfaction. Site left clean. We demobilise and you're ready for the next stage.

whyUs.headline: Why Choose MBE
whyUs.subheadline: 30 years of reputation built on one job at a time.

items.title: Extensive Fleet
items.description: From a 4.5T excavator to a 20T, grader, dozer, tipper trucks and more — we have the right machine for every job in the Hunter Valley.

items.title: Experienced Operators
items.description: Every machine comes with a professional, experienced operator. Wet hire means you get the equipment and the expertise.

items.title: Family-Owned & Local
items.description: Based in Cessnock, we're genuinely part of the community we serve. You deal with the owners, not a call centre.

items.title: Flexible Rates
items.description: Available on contract or hourly rates, Monday to Friday all year round — structured to suit your project and budget.

gallery.subheadline: A selection of earthmoving projects across the Hunter Valley.

contact.subheadline: Call us directly or send a message — we'll get back to you promptly.
